productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Adi Pixel Silver Flip Flop
description: Spice up your casual days with these ADI Pixel slippers from adidas. Available in funky colours, your expeditions become all the more comfortable in this comfy footwear. Pair it with slim jeans and any bright top for a stylish casual look.UpperThick fabric thong straps with piping on both the edges for snug Fit and protection from abrasionFabric toe separator for maximum comfortMock double strap on the medial side with stitched detailingMidsoleFoam footbed with graphics and brand mark for cushioned all-day comfort and styleFootbed with slightly raised metallic prints for a massage feelOutsoleTPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for greater grip and stabilityshoe careWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine wash Spice up your casual days with these ADI Pixel slippers from adidas.
